div1.entryFree: Pleasure, vb. to gratify, to fulfil the wish of: what I do is to p. you, Wiv. I, 1, 251. draw, to p. us, Ado V, 1, 129. may you stead me? will you p. me? Merch. I, 3, 7. what pleases him shall p. you, H6C III, 2, 22. I count it one of my greatest afflictions, that I cannot p. such an honourable gentleman, Tim. III, 2, 63.
